violations.text: Hot water was not available at the hand washing sink in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
The handwash sink in the staff restroom is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator gaskets and inside hot hold unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Hot water was not available at the hand wash sink in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
